scripts.start: npm run build && docker compose up --remove-orphans assistant_backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix apps/admin-frontend install && npm --prefix apps/chat-frontend install && npm --prefix apps/web-frontend install
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose run --rm assistant_backend python -m src.cli.migrate
scripts.db:seed: docker compose run --rm assistant_backend python -m src.cli.seed_admin
scripts.kb:sync-sources: docker compose run --rm -v "/Users/elvsevolod/Downloads:/host-downloads:ro" -v "/Users/elvsevolod/Desktop/Проект для АГМУ/Каф_эпид:/host-kaf-epid:ro" -e DOWNLOADS=/host-downloads -e KAF_EPID=/host-kaf-epid assistant_backend python -m src.cli.sync_source_manifest
scripts.kb:reindex: docker compose run --rm assistant_backend python -m src.cli.reindex_admin_documents --blue-green --concurrency 2
scripts.kb:refresh: npm run kb:sync-sources && npm run kb:reindex && npm run test:retrieval && npm run test:answers
scripts.test:retrieval: docker compose run --rm assistant_backend python -m src.cli.rag_retrieval_smoke --limit 0 --k 5 --fetch-k 30 --min-filtered-hit-rate 1.0 --min-unfiltered-topk-theme-rate 1.0
scripts.test:answers: docker compose run --rm assistant_backend python -m src.cli.rag_answer_eval --limit 0 --min-positive-pass-rate 0.8 --max-unknown-rate 0.2
scripts.test:all: npm run test:api && npm run build && npm run build:chat
scripts.compose:up: npm run build && docker compose up -d --build --remove-orphans
